scripts.typecheck: bunx tsc --noEmit -p packages/core && bunx tsc --noEmit -p packages/background-agents && bunx tsc --noEmit -p packages/workflows && bunx tsc --noEmit -p packages/workflows/tsconfig.tui.json && bunx tsc --noEmit -p packages/cadence && bunx tsc --noEmit -p packages/statusline && bunx tsc --noEmit -p packages/statusline/tsconfig.tui.json
